content:
God of Slaughter

Chapter 1554: Zhen Ru

Translator:

Sigma_

Editor:

SSins

Mei Ji’s words silenced all the warriors in the hall. The atmosphere was so quiet that they could even hear the clinking sound of a needle falling on the ground.

Those people came from different territories. Many of them were leading experts that controlled an entire area or dependent clans. They had power.

More or less, they got the news. They knew the reasons why the sea of stars boiled up and the wrath of the Soul Clan, Devouring Clan, Ancient Monster Clan, and Black Demon Clan.

Just like what Mei Ji had said, Shi Yan had slaughtered the ancestral lands of the four clans. What else did he dare not to do?

Montecie was pleased with the subduing effects provided by Shi Yan’s title of God of Slaughter. She smiled and then nodded to Mei Ji. After that, she glanced at her sister Cantecie.

Cantecie wore a cold face. Her eyes didn’t convey any significant emotion. Similarly, Fan De Lei didn’t utter a word.

“I suggest that we prepare for the war while waiting for Shi Yan to wake up,” said Montecie after a while. Her eyes with divine light raked through the crowd as she spoke calmly, “The four clans are all damaged badly. Shi Yan is their main target. We just need to say that we don’t know anything. If they still want a battle, we aren’t wrong in that case. Fighting isn’t a big deal. Are we afraid of them?”

The group that had tilted on Fan De Lei and Cantecie now recognized that Shi Yan was the final villain.

They were frightened instantly as they were afraid that they would have to face Shi Yan’s bloody revenge.

They weren’t as strong as the four clans. They couldn’t resist one wave of attack from Shi Yan. Perhaps, their entire race was going to go extinct because of Shi Yan’s rage.

Thus, after weighing the pros and cons, they agreed with Montecie’s plan.

——They were going to prepare for the war and observe the situation while waiting for Shi Yan to wake up.

They decided that way.

——————————

Inside Montecie’s palace, her eyes were so bright as she asked excitedly, “Show me! Hurry!”

Mei Ji nodded and urged her soul energy. Right after that, her soul altar slowly emerged above her head. What Mei Ji cultivated was Ice power Upanishad, which made her soul altar spacial-looking. It was like a crystal glacier in a snowstorm.

A snowflake that represented her power Upanishad hovered in her soul altar. Above the snowflake was an Original Symbol with a vague cold air twirling around it, which had Mei Ji’s Soul Consciousness. It was uncontrollably releasing magical power of Ice power Upanishad.

Feeling the cold energy and seeing all things in her palace get frozen, Montecie’s eyes brightened and gave compliments. “What an excellent Original Symbol! An Original Symbol represents a supernatural ability. It seems like your Ice power Upanishad will become more condensed and profound.”

“I didn’t expect him to refine me an Original Symbol that fast,” Mei Ji sounded embarrassed.

“Haha,” Montecie had a good mood. “That kid has created a genocide in the four clans. He killed so many members of the four clans. Of course, he harvested an enormous amount of energy. I guessed he would change greatly, but I couldn’t think that he was right in our Phantom Clan. It seems that Serene Prison’s team has laid their eyes on me. It’s their luck then.”

“Grannie, do you really want to fight against the four clans?” Mei Ji’s face turned serious.

It was true that Shi Yan’s maniac massacre had damaged the four clans greatly. Many experts based on their homelands had lost their lives.

No matter what, they were the strong clans with their names known everywhere for tens of thousands of years. Their deep foundation couldn’t be estimated. The Phantom Clan was slightly weaker than the other four clans.

Mei Ji understood that even if the Phantom Clan was attacked, despite their losses, their roots wouldn’t be affected.

Because the combined forces from the big territories and the dependent clans was much stronger than the force guarding their headquarters.

Similarly, the Soul Clan, Devouring Clan, Black Demon Clan, and Ancient Monster Clan still had many experts living in other territories and important locations. They were loyal forces of the four clans. If they joined this war, they would become a heavy pressure toward the Phantom Clan and the White Bone Clan.

Montecie wasn’t actually as calm as she showed. She understood that once the war burst out, both sides would have to bear significant losses, just like Cantecie and Fan De Lei had predicted.

“Did you think that only we would be worried and Serene Prison, Edgar, Beverly, and Rupert wouldn’t be? Haha, you have to know that the Mysterious Sky Clan, the most cunning clan among the seven clans, hasn’t picked their side yet. Moreover, this time, Shi Yan had spared the White Bone Clan, our Phantom Clan, and even the Mysterious Sky Clan. Do you know what that means?” Montecie’s petite face was smiling, her eyes bright with wisdom.

Mei Ji’s soft body slightly quivered. “You mean...”

“I’m sure that the Mysterious Sky Clan has a secret agreement with Shi Yan!” Montecie said affirmatively. “The Mysterious Sky Clan is stronger than us. If we join the White Bone Clan and the Mysterious Sky Clan, can you guess which side will have a greater chance to win?”

Mei Ji smiled charmingly. Her graceful body swayed like a flower in the breeze.

“When Shi Yan wakes up, we can contact the Mysterious Sky Clan through him. We will sign a secret treaty with them. When that happens, I wish the four clans will attack us. It’s also a chance to change the situation of this sea of stars. I’m looking for it, though.” Montecie squinted, her face eager. “However, you have to keep an eye on Cantecie and Fan De Lei. You have to protect Shi Yan. I’m afraid that these two are having some conspiracy.”

“They dare?” Mei Ji was surprised.

“I found Cantecie and Fan De Lei have a discreet connection with the members of the four clans. I hope they know the limit. Otherwise, hmm!” Montecie pulled a cold face, her eyes emitting murderous aura.

——————————

In another hidden land inside the Phantom Clan where Cantecie cultivated, Cantecie, Fan De Lei, and their subordinates gathered and discussed the matters that happened in the meeting hall today.

Fan De Lei’s handsome face looked glum and discontented. “I don’t know why she has to stick to that Shi Yan. Is it because he has the Power Upanishad Symbol Tower? If we join hands and kill him when he’s cultivating, we will get the Power Upanishad Symbol Tower. Isn’t that better for us?”

“It’s not that simple,” Cantecie shook her head and said calmly, “You’ve fought with Shi Yan. You know how tough he is. He’s mastered the Space power Upanishad. It’s not easy to kill him.”

“Then what should we do? Do we have to follow them?” Fan De Lei sounded reluctant.

“I’m still thinking,” Cantecie frowned.

However, at this moment, a found-faced warrior standing by them suddenly guffawed strangely.

This fat warrior had many dreadlocks. With a closer look, those dreadlocks were actually finger-sized, green tentacles. They were dangling and moving peculiarly.

He was a member of the Heavenly Ox Tribe, a small tribe dependent on the Phantom Clan. Fan De Lei had conquered this tribe. Thus, they were under his command. After they left the meeting hall, he had followed Cantecie and Fan De Lei to this place. Listening to their discussion, he suddenly acted strangely.

As he was still laughing bizarrely, the fat man’s body twisted as he was transfiguring. In less than one minute, he had become a graceful young girl around twenty years old. She wore a simple silver dress. Her aura, soul altar, and God power had changed as her appearance changed.

“Who are you?” Cantecie looked bewildered for the first time.

The aura on this girl gave her a dangerous feeling. The pressure in her soul told her that this girl wasn’t normal.

“You don’t know me, but your sister Montecie does. I killed this fatty of the Heavenly Ox Tribe and disguised as him to attend your Phantom Clan’s meeting. I know your plan and what you and Fan De Lei are talking about.” The graceful girl smiled and calmly looked at Cantecie. “I’m interested in your plan. I think we can cooperate. Find a chance to lure Mei Ji away; I will use Mei Ji’s appearance to deal with Shi Yan.”

Then, the girl transfigured again and turned into Mei Ji’s appearance. Her makings, aura, body, and even the soul energy fluctuations matched. There was almost no flaw.

If Cantecie and Fan De Lei didn’t see her transfiguration with their own eyes, they would have thought that she was Mei Ji; they couldn’t differentiate between them.

“Excellent!” Cantecie’s eyes sparkled strangely. She searched her memories. In the next second, she discolored in fear. “Zhen Ru! Zhen Ru of Myriad Shape Tribe, one of the Ten Great Territory Ancestors! It’s you!”

Myriad Shape Tribe was just a weak tribe in this sea of stars. Members of this tribe could transfigure into any shape. The higher their realm was, the more magical their transfiguration could be. They could become any member of any race, with an identical body, soul, and aura.

This tribe wasn’t really eye-catching. However, as soon as Zhen Ru appeared, she had made the reputation of the tribe known everywhere.

Although Zhen Ru was just like other members of Myriad Shape Tribe, her innate talents in using the supernatural power of the tribe to an amazing level helped her gain a lot of benefits. She had reached Territory Ancestor Realm. Eventually, together with Sauron and Yuan Zu, she had become one of the Ten Great Territory Ancestors who didn’t come from the Seven Great Clans.

“If you know who I am, are you more confident?” Zhen Ru giggled in Mei Ji’s shape. Her charming and sexy makings were identical to Mei Ji. The others couldn’t spot the differences. “I know Fan De Lei is interested in Skyfall Star River and you want the Power Upanishad Symbol Tower. I can leave them to you as long as you help me.”

Fan De Lei and Cantecie were moved.

“What do you want?” Cantecie sounded as calm as usual. She didn’t show that she was convinced. “You wouldn’t come here for nothing, would you? What do you want from Shi Yan?”

“Besides the Power Upanishad Symbol Tower and Skyfall Star River, everything else on Shi Yan will belong to me,” Zhen Ru smiled beautifully. “Anyway, you just need to know that I’ll bring you hope. This is the Phantom Clan, your lair. If you help me with your best, my plan will succeed one hundred percent of the time. What do you think?”

Fan De Lei and Cantecie exchanged looks. They kept silent for a long time. After that, Cantecie said, “We need to discuss the details first. Yeah, we should talk more.”

Shen Ru’s smile became brighter when she heard that. She knew her business would succeed soon.
